title: androcalva luteiflora
intro: Androcalva luteiflora, also known as Yellow Bells, is a plant species in the family Cunoniaceae. It is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Androcalva luteiflora include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its traditional use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Androcalva luteiflora can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil to be used in herbal remedies, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to limited research on its effects.
